data.label: Property Record
data.description:
A registered land parcel or property in Cordova.
Business Context: Links to Civil Registry (person owners) and Business Registry (business owners)
Purpose: Document a property with location, type, and current ownership

items.label: Parcel Number
items.description: Cordova property parcel identifier. Format: PP-CC-NNNNNN where PP is the province code, CC is the city code, and NNNNNN is a parcel sequence number.

items.label: Address (Line 1)
items.description: Street address line, building/apartment number, or P.O. Box number.

items.label: Address (Line 2)
items.description: Street address line, building/apartment number, or P.O. Box number.

items.label: City
items.description: One of the nine cities in the Republic of Cordova.

items.label: Property Status
items.description: Current status of the property in the registry

items.label: Property Type (Cordova)
items.description: Classification of real property in the Cordova Property Registry.

items.label: Province
items.description: One of the three provinces of the Republic of Cordova. Used across civil registry, property, tax, and all geographic records.

items.label: Registration Date
items.description: Date the business was officially registered in Cordova

items.label: Liens and Encumbrances
items.description:
Outstanding liens, mortgages, or legal encumbrances on the property.
Purpose: Record financial and legal claims against the property
Parent Cluster: Property Record

items.label: Lien Status
items.description: Current status of the lien

items.label: Lien Type
items.description: Type of lien or encumbrance

items.label: Lien Amount
items.description: Monetary value of the lien or encumbrance recorded against the property in Cordova Córdoba. Represents the outstanding obligation secured by the property.

items.label: Lien Date
items.description: Date the lien was recorded

items.label: Property Value Assessment
items.description:
Property value assessment for tax purposes.
Purpose: Record assessed values that link to Tax & Revenue for property tax filings
Parent Cluster: Property Record

items.label: Assessment Status
items.description: Status of the assessment

items.label: Assessed Value
items.description: Government-determined market value of the property in Cordova Córdoba. Used as the basis for property tax calculation by the Cordova Tax Authority.

items.label: Land Area
items.description: Total area of the land parcel in square meters as recorded in the cadastral survey. Used for property assessment, zoning compliance, and land use planning.

items.label: Transfer History
items.description:
Record of property ownership transfers with notary attestation.
Business Context: Demonstrates full Attestation — notary-attested transfers with buyer, seller, and price
Purpose: Document the provenance chain of property ownership changes
Parent Cluster: Property Record

items.label: Transfer Amount
items.description: Sale price or transfer value of the property transaction in Cordova Córdoba. Recorded at the time of ownership transfer for tax and registry purposes.

items.label: Transfer Date
items.description: Date the transfer was executed

subject.label: Property Owner
subject.description: Person or organization that owns a property. W3C PROV-DM Agent with ownership type and start date. Supports both CID (individual) and BRN (corporate) identifiers.

provider.label: Property Registry Office
provider.description: Government office responsible for property records, land titles, and transfer registration. W3C PROV-DM Agent (Organization).
